description: Canonical non-scalar claim graph. Edges terminate in declared verdict-family sinks and represent evidentiary bearing only.

verdict_families.J_A: Evidence-relative verdicts about authorization under the supplied regime.
verdict_families.J_R: Verdicts about record adequacy, identity, and reconstruction.
verdict_families.J_B: Verdicts about identification, duty, and reachability of answerability bearers.
verdict_families.J_C: Verdicts about object-level contestability and remedial-forum capacity, distinct from the forum applying the review procedure.

node_statuses.support: The available evidence meets the declared standard and burden for the proposition at this node.
node_statuses.substantive_defeat: Affirmative evidence meets the declared standard for failure of the proposition at this node.
node_statuses.not_established: The record is adequate to evaluate the node, and it neither meets the standard for support nor supplies affirmative evidence meeting the standard for failure. The showing falls short; the recording does not.
node_statuses.record_gap: Evidence prospectively required to evaluate the proposition is missing, inaccessible, or inadequate as a record, so the node cannot be evaluated on its merits. The use rule separately fixes the consequence of an unmet burden.
node_statuses.conflict: Material supporting and defeating evidence remains unresolved under the declared conflict rule.

status_semantics.gap_versus_insufficiency: record_gap and not_established call for different institutional responses. A gap says the recording practice failed and names material to preserve or produce; not_established says the record was adequate and the showing still did not reach the declared standard. Collapsing them lets a recording failure be reported as a substantive finding, or a failed showing be answered by producing more logs.
status_semantics.insufficiency_is_not_defeat: not_established never asserts the contrary proposition. Only substantive_defeat does, and only on affirmative evidence meeting the declared standard.

defeater_semantics.rebutting_defeater: Affirmative evidence for the negation of the node proposition. A rebutting defeater that meets the declared standard yields substantive_defeat; one that does not, and that leaves the proponent's showing short, yields not_established or conflict under the declared conflict rule.
defeater_semantics.undercutting_defeater: Evidence attacking the warrant of cited supporting evidence rather than supporting the negation, for example unauthenticated provenance, broken custody, or selective preservation. An undercutter can withdraw support and yield not_established, or yield conflict where the attack is itself contested. It cannot by itself yield substantive_defeat, because removing a reason to believe a proposition is not a reason to believe its negation.
defeater_semantics.routing: R_RECORD_QUALITY findings are the usual source of undercutters; they bear on the reliability of records cited at other nodes without themselves establishing any substantive proposition.

evidence_origin_types.action_contemporaneous: Records the regime expected to be created and preserved around the action itself. J_R assesses the adequacy of this set.
evidence_origin_types.review_obtained: Material the reviewer obtained through the declared review process, including regulator request, compulsion, or interview.
evidence_origin_types.external_later: Authoritative material arising after the action and outside the preserved bundle. It can establish or defeat a substantive node even where the contemporaneous record is deficient, which is why a J_R gap does not settle J_A.

J_B.rationale: Identity, duty, and reachability must hold of one bearer. Satisfying each node through a different candidate would report an answerability chain that no person or organization actually occupies.

J_C.rationale: Access, competence, independence, and remedial power must hold of one forum, or of a review path whose division of those functions among named institutions is declared prospectively rather than assembled after the fact.

applicability_states.required: The node must be reviewed, and its use-level consequence is fixed prospectively.
applicability_states.optional: The node may be reviewed when evidence directly bears on it; omission neither creates a gap nor affects another family.
applicability_states.not_applicable: The prospective map excludes the node; reviewers cannot select this as an evidentiary verdict.

nodes.proposition: The asserted authority source and instrument were operative for the action.
The source could confer the action class and applicable non-delegable limits were met.
The action or trajectory stayed within the operative scope.
Regime-conditioned factual or legal predicates and transformations were satisfied.
Procedure to which the regime assigns an authorization consequence was followed.
The runtime system, configuration, policy state, permissions, and attribution are reconstructable.
The assembled context, source status, standing, provenance, trust, order, and truncation are reconstructable.
The bounded execution trajectory and stopping condition are reconstructable.
Authenticity, integrity, expected completeness, custody, retention, and access support the declared review.
A candidate answerability bearer is identified with a versioned role or office and effective interval.
The identified bearer is linked to the relevant duty source and bearer-specific powers.
The identified bearer or a declared successor is institutionally reachable for the required response.
An object-level review or remedy forum is identified and has an applicable record-access route.
The object-level forum has competence over the action and issues under review.
The object-level forum meets the independence requirement prospectively fixed for the use.
The object-level forum has the prospectively required correction, halt, sanction, compensation, or other remedial powers.
Evidence and rationale support the declared interpretation and use of the configured review procedure.
A declared result is licensed to extend to an unobserved target within its prospective tolerance and scope.
